display_text: Ex Machina, Tier N / Classification: NON_PURCHASABLE: Active ability 'Reset Cooldowns' instantly resets the cooldown on all other items (except Refresher Orb). A high-impact utility effect that allows double activation of powerful items like Black King Bar, Scythe of Vyse, or Satanic in a single fight. Requires a significant mana investment. Stats: CD: 60s, Mana Cost: 350, Total Cost: 0.
